title: Add submission snapshots for grant-backed runs
body:
This draft PR adds three submission-style record folders for current Parameter Golf work.

Included:
- `records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-19_ValOnly_SlidingWindow_mlx/`
- `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-19_QAT_Int6_MLP3_SlidingWindow/`
- `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-21_SWA_BigramHash_SmearGate_Int5MLP_MuonWD/`

Current evidence:
- The MLX non-record run includes a real `train.log`, artifact under 16MB, and end-to-end validation of training, quantization/export, and evaluation.
- The two `track_10min_16mb` folders are code snapshots prepared in record format, but they do not yet include H100 `train.log` files or final metrics.

Why draft:
- I am applying for challenge compute credits and need a reviewable PR link.
- Final 10-minute-track metrics and logs will be added after funded H100 runs.

Intent:
- Use the MLX run as pipeline validation evidence.
- Backfill the pending 10-minute submission folders with verified H100 logs and metrics once compute is available.
